title: 宝塚記念の後に・上には上があるものよ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One loses the Takarazuka Kinen. Tamamo
Cross, despite having taken first place, doesn't
lose her hunger for victory in the slightest.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After experiencing firsthand White Lightning's
overwhelming performance, Inari One feels a
renewed competitiveness, and she vows to run
the Takarazuka Kinen again next year.
